app.title: VerusMiner

common.unknown_error_body: Unknown error has occured. Please try again.
common.how_proceed: How do you want to proceed?
common.server_comm_error: There's a problem communicating to the server! Please try again later or contact the Developer for support.
common.server_not_responding_body:
Either the server is down or the inputs are invalid.

Please check and try again.
common.invalid_setting_body: Scanned setting or address is currently unsupported.
common.delete_setting_confirm: Do you want to delete this setting?
common.mining_shutdown_timer: Mining will shutdown once the timer is up
common.monitoring_not_found_body: You can add a server if you want to monitor your miners from another device within your local network.
language.pick_subtitle: You can change this later in General setting. Language packs download when online.
language.download_failed: Could not download language pack. Using English for now.
home.get_started_subtitle: Quickstart walks you through, or add a miner setting yourself.
home.ready_subtitle: Open Mining and tap Start to begin.
home.ready_to_mine_body: This device looks compatible with Verus mining.
home.may_work_body: Mining might be limited on this device. You can still try — add a setting and start. Contact support if it fails.
home.not_mineable_body: This phone cannot mine Verus Coin. Try another device, or contact the development team for help.
home.actions_disabled: Mining actions are disabled on this device. Open Device Information for hardware details.
home.mining_log_hint: Newest first · timestamps on each line
settings.keep_mining_connected_sub: Phone tips so mining keeps working when the screen is off. A short setup now prevents pool disconnects overnight.
miner_setting.delete_confirm: Do you want to delete this setting?
miner_setting.tap_plus: Tap the + icon to add a setting
miner_setting.monitoring_id_hint: use VerusBox to generate an ID
miner_setting.donation_notice:
GENERATE YOUR OWN WALLET ADDRESS AS DESCIBED IN THE QUICKSTART AND USE IT TO START MINING.

PLEASE DO NOT ASK FOR ANY SUPPORT ABOUT HOW TO CLAIM ANY OF THESE AMOUNT AS YOU KNOW YOU HAVE NO SUCH OWNERSHIP.
mining_power.section_hint: Pick a simple profile for how hard to mine. Non-Custom profiles also set temperature and battery pauses (locked until you choose Custom).
mining_power.balanced_desc: Uses about half your phone’s cores — a good everyday choice
mining_power.performance_desc: Uses the faster cores when available — more speed, more heat
mining_power.performance_no_cluster: This phone has one core type — same as Balanced here
mining_power.cooler_desc: Uses fewer cores than Balanced — cooler and easier on battery
mining_power.custom_desc: You choose the CPU count and pauses yourself
mining_power.section_hint_short: Profiles set how many cores to use and when to pause for heat or battery.
mining_power.need_topology: Profiles unlock after a one-time “Detect CPU topology” in Device Info (stop mining first).
mining_power.balanced_detail:
Everyday mining using about half of your phone’s CPU cores. Easy on heat for most people.

Tip: Change the CPU number yourself and the app switches to Custom automatically.
mining_power.performance_detail:
Aims for higher hashrate by preferring the phone’s faster cores when it has them.

May use more power and run warmer. Best when plugged in and cooled well.

On simple phones without “fast/slow” cores, this matches Balanced.
mining_power.cooler_detail:
Uses fewer cores than Balanced so the phone stays cooler and battery lasts longer.

Good for overnight or warm rooms. Switch back to Balanced when you want more speed.
mining_power.custom_detail:
Full manual control. CPU starts from your General setting (or 1).

Temperature and battery pauses use simple defaults you can change.

Pick Balanced, Performance, or Cooler again anytime to re-apply that profile.
power.pre_mine_summary: Overnight disconnects are usually the phone sleeping Wi‑Fi or the app. A short checklist fixes battery, Wi‑Fi sleep, brand savers, and the mining notification.
power.pre_mine_summary_bullets:
• Allow unrestricted battery for VerusMiner
• Keep Wi‑Fi on when the screen is off
• Whitelist the app in brand battery savers
• Leave the mining notification on
remote_settings.restart_body: Please close this app completely, then open it again so the new language or downloaded setting can take full effect.
mining_power.suggest: We detected faster cores on this phone. Try Performance mode?
mining_power.general_help: When on, miner profiles can choose Mining power modes. Thread count and core affinity are applied automatically when you mine.
mining_power.big_little_b: This phone has {b} faster cores. Performance mining sticks to those cores.
mining_power.big_little_bl: This phone has {b} faster cores and {l} efficient cores. Performance mining sticks to the faster ones.
general.network_debug_on: On — show network tools while mining
general.network_debug_help: Shows a network tools button while mining to help diagnose disconnects.
general.network_debug_detail:
What it does: Adds a network debug button on the mining screen (works in normal release builds too). It logs whether Wi‑Fi is on, signal strength, and if the pool is reachable.

Why enable it: When mining keeps “retrying”, it is hard to tell if the pool is down or the phone put Wi‑Fi to sleep. These logs make that clear so you can fix the right phone setting instead of guessing.

Turn it off anytime if you do not need the extra button.
general.network_debug_off_screen:
Network debug is off.

Turn it on under General settings → Data Collection → NETWORK DEBUG, save, then start mining again.
power.title: Keep mining connected
power.intro_short: A few phone settings stop Wi‑Fi and mining from sleeping when the screen is off.
power.legend: Green = set · Orange = needs setup · Grey = check yourself · (i) = more info
power.battery_summary_ok: Already unrestricted — good for overnight mining.
power.battery_summary_need: Allow Unrestricted / Don’t optimize for VerusMiner.
power.battery_detail_ok:
Already set: VerusMiner is allowed to run without battery-saving limits.

Why this helps: Your phone won’t quietly pause mining or cut the network just to save a little battery while you sleep.

Tap Review if you want to double-check the system setting.
power.battery_detail_need:
What to do: Open battery settings and choose Unrestricted (or “Don’t optimize”) for VerusMiner.

Why this helps: Phones pause apps to save battery. That can stop mining or turn off Wi‑Fi overnight. Unrestricted tells the phone: keep this app running.
power.wifi_title: Wi‑Fi: stay on when screen is off
power.wifi_summary: On older phones set Wi‑Fi sleep policy to “Never”. Tap (i) for steps.
power.oem_summary: Whitelist VerusMiner in your brand’s battery / “never sleep” list.
power.notification_summary: Leave the mining notification on — don’t swipe it away.
power.locks_summary: Done for you while mining. Still set the items above.
power.game_summary_checking: Checking whether this phone supports Game Mode…
power.game_summary_unsupported: Optional. This phone may not expose Game Mode to apps — skip if you do not see Game Launcher / Game Booster.
power.game_summary_performance: Game Mode is Performance — good for mining on this phone.
power.game_summary_other: Game Mode available (current: {mode}). Manually set VerusMiner to Performance if the app cannot switch it for you.
power.remind_on: On — show this checklist when you start mining (recommended).
power.remind_off: Off — no popup. Open this page anytime from Settings.
power.still_disconnecting: Still disconnecting? General setting → Network debug can show if Wi‑Fi turned off.
power.pre_mine_dont_show: Don’t show this again before mining
power.pre_mine_open_anytime: You can open this guide anytime from Settings or Device Information.
power.intro_detail:
Mining keeps talking to the pool over Wi‑Fi (or mobile data) even when the screen is off. Phones try to save power by sleeping apps and Wi‑Fi. When that happens you lose the connection, see endless “retry” messages, and earn less — even though the app looks like it is still running.

A few one-time phone settings keep the link stable for overnight mining. It only takes a minute and is the most common fix for mysterious disconnects.
power.wifi_detail:
What to do:
• Older phones — Wi‑Fi settings → Wi‑Fi preferences → Wi‑Fi sleep policy. Pick option 3, “Never”.
  1. When screen turns off — not good for mining (Wi‑Fi sleeps)
  2. Never when charging — OK if you always mine while plugged in
  3. Never — best choice for stable mining
• Newer phones — also turn off “turn off Wi‑Fi when screen is off”, “adaptive connectivity”, or similar power-saving Wi‑Fi options (names vary by brand: Samsung, Xiaomi, Oppo, Pixel, etc.).

Why this helps: The mining pool needs a live connection the whole time. If Wi‑Fi sleeps with the screen, the pool drops you and hashrate stalls until you wake the phone.
power.oem_detail:
What to do: In Device care, Battery, or App power management, put VerusMiner on the “never sleep”, “unrestricted”, or “no restrictions” list. You can re-open app details anytime to confirm.

Why this helps: Many brands add extra battery savers on top of Android. Those can still kill mining even after the normal battery setting looks fine. Whitelisting VerusMiner stops those surprise stops.
power.notification_detail:
What to do: While mining, leave the VerusMiner notification in the status bar. Do not swipe it away.

Why this helps: That small notification tells Android the app is actively working. Without it, the phone is more likely to pause mining in the background.
power.locks_detail:
What to do: Nothing extra — VerusMiner does this for you while mining.

Why this helps: The app asks Android to keep the CPU and Wi‑Fi radio from napping during a session. This helps, but it cannot turn Wi‑Fi back on if you (or the phone brand) fully disabled it — still complete the steps above.
power.game_detail:
What the app can do: While mining, VerusMiner sends a GameState “gameplay active” hint (Android 13+) so the system may prefer higher clocks. That is not the same as forcing Game Mode = Performance on every brand.

What to do if you have Game Mode / Game Launcher / Game Booster:
1. Open Game Launcher, Game Space, Game Turbo, or Game Mode in system settings.
2. Add VerusMiner to the game list if needed.
3. Set the mode to Performance (not Battery Saver / Balanced).
4. Leave thermal / “auto FPS” limits off if you only care about CPU mining.

Tap “Apply performance hint” to re-send the hint and open app details.

Note: May increase heat and power use. Best when plugged in. Skip if your phone has no Game Mode.
power.remind_detail:
What it does: When on, VerusMiner shows this checklist each time you start mining.

Why enable it: Phone updates or battery-saver changes can reset your settings. A short reminder helps you catch that before you leave the phone mining overnight.

You can turn this off anytime. The full guide is always available from Settings or Device Information.
power.device_info_sub: Simple phone tips so mining keeps working when the screen is off. Prevents pool disconnects overnight — open anytime.
device.stop_before_detect: Stop mining before detecting CPU topology.
device.topology_hint: Optional one-shot scan for performance vs efficiency cores. Does not change after detection on this phone.
device.topology_saved_hint: Saved from a one-time scan. Topology does not change on this phone, so re-scan is not needed.
device.optional_big_little_body: Run a one-time scan for performance vs efficiency cores. Helps future mining power recommendations.
device.build_based_on: Based on your phone’s CPU. Mixed cores use the faster type; unknown CPUs get the generic build.
device.on_recommended: You’re on the recommended build for this CPU.
device.may_improve: may improve hashrate on this phone.
device.releases_open_fail: Could not open the releases page. Search for “verus_miner-release” on GitHub.
device.unknown_cpu_body: Could not read CPU details. Use the generic build (v8a-gen).
device.no_matching_build: No matching optimized build for this CPU. Use the generic build (v8a-gen).
device.mixed_cpu_build: For mixed CPUs, use the faster-core optimized build: {tag}.
miner.exit_body: Exiting the screen. Miner will still be active.
miner.paused_timer: Mining will start once the timer is up
miner.paused_temp: Device temperature threshold was reached. Mining will start once the timer is up
miner.paused_charge: Device charge percentage threshold was reached. Mining will start once the timer is up
miner.paused_temp_screen_error: It's very likely the active screen is not the mining screen when temperature threshold was reached. Just restart the app and start the miner to continue.
miner.paused_charge_screen_error: It's very likely the active screen is not the mining screen when charge percentage threshold was reached. Just restart the app and start the miner to continue.
miner.accepted_help: Number of accepted solutions sent to the mining pool
miner.difficulty_help: Difficulty sent by the network. The higher the difficulty, the harder the challenge to solve
miner.max_hash_help: Maximum hashrate recorded within since the last start
miner.temperature_help: Device temperature. Keep it cool below 30°C to maintain the performance and prolong the batter life
miner.rejected_help: Number of rejected solutions sent to the mining pool
miner.data_usage_help: Network data consumed since the last start of mining
miner.up_time_help: Duration of mining since the last start
miner.not_allowed_body: Your phone did not meet the requirements to execute the miner.
miner.no_setting_body: Miner setting not found. Please add the setting and try again.
miner.setup_wait: Setting up the environment. Please wait ...
miner.dev_fee_note:
Running the miner requires {fee} Dev fee. This roughly translates to {minutes}.

NOTE : Mining and dev fee claim only run during the mining operation. Running the miner in the background without the user consent is never performed.

Keep Wi‑Fi on and battery unrestricted while the screen is off (see the previous phone-settings checklist), or the pool may disconnect.
tools.love_hear: We love to hear from you!
net.help: OS Wi‑Fi/radio + DNS/TCP to pool. Correlates with miner retry.
net.empty:
No network debug lines yet.
Start mining or tap Refresh.
onboarding.welcome_body: VerusMiner is a mining app for the Verus Coin Project. A free, easy to use beginner friendly miner.
onboarding.easy_setup_body: Starting miner is as easy as pressing a button. No confusing and time consuming steps needed.
onboarding.monitoring_body: Online and offline monitoring are available on the go for free.
onboarding.visualization_body: Peek into your miner's health and performance with in-built graphs.
onboarding.start_earning_body: Create your setting then run your miner now!
quickstart.get_verus_mobile_body: Verus Mobile is available for iOS and Android. Verus Desktop can also be used to generate a wallet address.
quickstart.generate_wallet_body:
Create your own wallet address. This will be used to receive your mining rewards.

Public address/key is shareable however, private key and the 24 seed words are not. Don't loose it or share to anyone.
quickstart.create_miner_setting_body: Add a new miner setting. You can add as many settings as you need.
quickstart.paste_and_save_body:
Paste the wallet address to the 'WALLET ADDRESS' input field and then save.

A warning message will appear when you use a newly created address after you save. Just double check then proceed.
quickstart.start_miner_body:
Run your miner to start earning a reward. You can adjust the 'CPU' to a higher value to get a higher hashrate.

Enable the overlay and background process to allow running in the background while the screen is off.
app.custom_wallet_notice:
Custom wallet address is not fully supported.

Using a non-verus wallet address is highly discouraged as validation cannot be performed.

If you believe this is correct, please proceed with caution and make sure the wallet address is properly generated or coming from a trusted source. Otherwise update your setting.
app.no_tx_notice: No transactions have been found however, if you believe this is new and safely generated, just recheck then proceed with your operation.
community.subscribe_body: Subscribe to the following links to get the latest news and updates directly from the Verus Coin community.
common.copy_setting_body: New setting will be created using {name}.
common.set_default_body: {name} will be used as the default setting.
common.network_error_card:
An error occurred.
Please check your network and try again.
mining_power.ambient_tip: Tip: Mining usually works best in cool air around 18–28 °C. Above that, use better cooling or Cooler profile. Below 18 °C is usually fine.
mining_power.comfort_applied: Temperature and battery pause limits were set for this profile. You can still change them below.
history.empty_hint: Go to 'General Setting' to enable history collection.
history.no_samples: No samples were saved for this session. Enable history collection before mining.
miner.max_hash_temp_help: Device temperature when the maximum hashrate was achieved this session
mining_power.comfort_summary:
Pause mining at {temp} °C for {tempMin} min.
Pause mining at {charge}% battery for {chargeMin} min.
mining_power.custom_comfort_note: You set temperature and battery pauses yourself.
miner_setting.foundation_wallet_body:
Address {addr} belongs to the Verus Coin Foundation — not you.
Create your own wallet in Quickstart, then mine to that address.
Do not ask support to claim this balance.
Using it donates rewards to the community (refunds are unlikely).
miner.accepted_per_hour_help: Average accepted shares per hour since mining started this session
app.invalid_wallet_notice:
Don't panic. Wallet address is probably invalid or has been newly created.

No transactions have been found however, if you believe this is new and safely generated, just recheck then proceed with your operation.
mining_power.comfort_locked_hint: Temperature and battery pauses are set by this profile. Switch to Custom to edit them.
power.ambient_summary: Best mining is often around 18–28 °C room temperature. Hotter rooms need better cooling or Cooler profile.
power.ambient_detail:
Phones throttle or get unstable when they overheat. Aim for a cool room (about 18–28 °C).

Above ~28 °C: improve airflow, remove a case if needed, use Cooler profile, or pause when hot.

Below ~18 °C: usually fine for mining — cold air helps keep the chip cool.

This is a comfort tip for the room/environment, not the battery % or in-app temperature pause settings.
mining_power.profile_locked_hint: Locked by this profile: CPU threads, temperature pause, and battery pause. Other fields stay editable. Switch to Custom to unlock.
general.history_storage_note: Best for short sessions (checking stats). Mining speed is not affected, but leaving this on for a long time will use more storage on the phone.
theme.dropdown_hint: Colors for headers, cards, inputs, and snackbars. Mining terminal stays fixed.
theme.dropdown_hint_save: Applied when you save general settings.
language.dropdown_hint_save: Applied when you save general settings. Restart the app to load the pack.
app.community_note: This app is provided to the Verus Coin community to quickly setup and launch a miner from mobile devices. No personal data is collected although some user data is needed for monitoring and better support.
miner.cancel_countdown_reconnect: Cancelling the countdown will have you start the miner again to connect to the monitoring server.
miner.cancel_countdown_shutdown: Cancelling the countdown will cancel the scheduled shutdown and continue with the normal mining operation.
miner.cancel_countdown_manual: Cancelling the countdown will have you start the miner again manually.
miner.open_verusmonitor_body: This will open a browser and redirect you to VerusMonitor website.
general.history_info_detail:
When on, session stats are saved for the History tab. Storage grows with time — clear old sessions if space is limited.

Network-critical events are still recorded even between interval snapshots.
general.visualization_info_detail:
Shows live hashrate, temperature, and share charts on the home dashboard while mining.

Turn off to free screen space and slightly reduce UI work.
general.data_retention_info_detail: How long visualization samples are kept in memory for graphs. Longer windows use more RAM.
notification.channel_description: Shows mining status while the miner is running in the background.
